hero.title: Kufikika
hero.lead: IATF ikufuna kuti webusaitiyi ikhale yosavuta, yowerengeka, yopezeka ndi kiyibodi, komanso yogwirizana ndi matekinoloje othandizira.
support: Kupezeka pa intaneti, IATF imagwiritsa ntchito [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/) Kufikira kwa machitidwe kumadziwikanso ndi zochitika zenizeni za ogwiritsa ntchito matekinoloje othandizira.

paragraphs: Ngati mupeza choletsa kupeza pa webusaitiyi, chonde lipoti izo ndi imelo:
items: luso lothandiza, msakatuli, kapena chipangizo chimene mukugwiritsa ntchito, ngati n'koyenera
report.footnote: Simukufunikira kulemba lipoti la kachilombo. Kufotokoza momveka bwino n'kokwanira.

paragraphs: Nkhani zopezeka zitha kufotokozedwa mwachidule m'malo osungira anthu kuti athe kuwongoleredwa poyera. Zambiri zamalumikizidwe ndi zosafunikira zachinsinsi zimachotsedwa zisanafalitsidwe.
Ngati lipoti lanu likuphatikizapo chidziŵitso chaumwini, nenani momveka bwino m'uthengawo.
Tsambali mwadala ndi laling'ono ndipo makamaka lokhazikika. Mabaibulo ena azilankhulo atha kukhala osakwanira pomwe matembenuzidwe akukonzekera.
